title: Behind the Scenes - Introduction to Artificial Intelligence with Brian Yu - Chapter 1 - Playing
summary: CS50 is Harvard University's introduction to computer science and programming, taught by David J. Malan. The course covers AI fundamentals and is available through multiple platforms including edX, Harvard Extension School, and OpenCourseWare, with an active global community across numerous social channels.
writeup: This CS50 video is a behind-the-scenes look at Chapter 1, "Playing," from the Introduction to Artificial Intelligence series with Brian Yu, part of Harvard University's introduction to computer science and programming led by David J. Malan. It situates the AI material within CS50's broader curriculum, which spans AI fundamentals and software engineering. The course is distributed across edX, Harvard Extension School, and OpenCourseWare, and it is supported by an active global community on numerous social channels.
